prompt: A surreal 70s dystopian image: an enormous spiral of tanks, missiles, and warplanes descending into a black void. At the very center of the spiral, a tiny medical clinic with a single flickering light. The military hardware dwarfs the clinic by a factor of hundreds. Sickly red and grey palette. Smoke and ash in the air. The feeling is: 604 dollars on weapons for every 1 dollar on cures.
styledPrompt:
A surreal 70s dystopian image: an enormous spiral of tanks, missiles, and warplanes descending into a black void. At the very center of the spiral, a tiny medical clinic with a single flickering light. The military hardware dwarfs the clinic by a factor of hundreds. Sickly red and grey palette. Create an image with a fun retro scientific illustration style.
Additional art direction: 1970s dystopian science fiction illustration. Style of HR Giger meets Soviet propaganda meets John Harris. Industrial decay, oppressive architecture, toxic skies. Desaturated palette with sickly reds, greys, and toxic yellows. Claustrophobic, decaying, surveillance-state aesthetic. No text, no labels, no UI elements.
